criteria.name: User Ratings
criteria.description: Average rating given by users on app stores.

criteria.name: Downloads
criteria.description: Total number of downloads of the app.
criteria.sources: App Store, Google Play Store, Sensor Tower

criteria.name: AI Features
criteria.description: Availability and sophistication of AI-powered features such as automatic enhancements, object recognition, and style transfer.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, official websites

criteria.name: User Interface
criteria.description: Ease of use and intuitiveness of the app's interface.

criteria.name: Update Frequency
criteria.description: How often the app is updated with new features and bug fixes.

criteria.name: Subscription Model
criteria.description: Cost and value of the app's subscription model, if applicable.
criteria.sources: App Store, Google Play Store, official websites

criteria.name: Social Media Integration
criteria.description: Ease of sharing edited photos and videos on social media platforms.

criteria.name: Cross-Platform Availability
criteria.description: Availability of the app on different platforms (iOS, Android, Web, etc.).
criteria.sources: App Store, Google Play Store, official websites
